name: Benham
description: Benham the Viral Hamster is a small but commanding presence, known for his sharp curiosity and quiet confidence. Every corner of his habitat is carefully inspected, redesigned, and claimed as his own. He balances long periods of thoughtful stillness with sudden, high-energy bursts of movement, especially during late-night wheel sessions. A disciplined hoarder and strategic planner, Benham never forgets where a snack is stored. His personality combines independence, resilience, and a calm intensity that makes him captivating to observe. Though tiny in stature, Benham carries himself like a seasoned ruler, proving that size has nothing to do with influence or character.
